params.label: Populations
params.tip: Track populations whose HMM state columns to read, across any segmentation (e.g. A/_tracked, B/_tracked, C/_tracked). Same selection style as HMM States.

params.label: Name
params.tip: Suffix for the output column: live.cell.hmm.transitions.<name>.

params.label: HMM states
params.tip: One or more HMM state columns. Several are combined into a hybrid state before transitions. In the combined HMM task this is set automatically from the states step.

params.label: Include start
params.tip: Emit the first in-track transition (from the track start).

params.label: Self transitions
params.tip: Keep transitions where the state does not change (e.g. 1_1).
